profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Reality is the most honest critic; let it edit your vision before perfectionism paralyzes it.
profile.working_on: making a roguelike about your parents' failing restaurant—three shipped versions beat any design document

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to confront and transform personal history into a playable narrative, embracing imperfection as part of the creative journey.
